def.type.construct.name: Construct
def.type.construct.note: ACKS type rule, MM p.11: constructs are immune to enchantment effects, necrotic damage, and poisonous damage.

def.type.ooze.name: Ooze
def.type.ooze.note: ACKS type rule, MM p.12: oozes vary, but all are immune to enchantment effects.

def.type.plant.name: Plant
def.type.plant.note: ACKS type rule, MM p.12: all plants are immune to necrotic damage and poisonous damage.

def.type.undead.name: Undead
def.type.undead.note: ACKS type rule, MM p.12: all undead are immune to enchantment effects, necrotic damage, and poisonous damage.
